instruction: I need to "turn off" notifications for my system in the settings.
answer_text: Notifications have been successfully turned off for the system. The main Notifications toggle at the top of the Settings > System > Notifications page is now in the "Off" position, which disables notifications from apps and other senders.

instruction: Enable the "Night light" feature and set it to turn on at 7:00 PM and off at 7:00 AM.
answer_text: The Night light feature has been successfully enabled and configured. The schedule is set to turn on at 7:00 PM and turn off at 7:00 AM as requested. The settings show "On until 7:00 AM" and the custom hours are properly configured with 7 PM for turn on and 7 AM for turn off.

instruction: I need to change my system time zone to 'Pacific (US & Canada)'. Can you help me do that?
Change my desktop background to a solid color.
Enable the "Storage Sense" feature and configure it to run every week.
answer_text:
Storage Sense has been successfully enabled and configured to run every week. The Settings page shows:

1. Storage Sense is turned **On** (Automatic User content cleanup toggle)
2. "Run Storage Sense" is set to **"Every week"**
3. Additional configuration options are available for recycle bin cleanup (30 days) and Downloads folder cleanup

The task is complete.
